mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, job_no, real_name, remark, status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, user_id, username, job_no, real_name, remark, status, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'USER') AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight) AS total_flights, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order) AS total_ticket_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'ISSUED') AS issued_ticket_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'REFUNDED') AS refunded_ticket_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT') AS pending_payment_ticket_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM waitlist_order) AS total_waitlist_orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM waitlist_order WHERE status = 'WAITING') AS waiting_waitlist_orders, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM ticket_order WHERE status = 'ISSUED'), 0.00) AS gross_issued_order_revenue, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(refund_amount) FROM refund_record), 0.00) AS ticket_refund_amount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(refund_amount) FROM waitlist_order), 0.00) AS waitlist_refund_amount, ( COALESCE((SELECT SUM(refund_amount) FROM refund_record), 0.00) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(refund_amount) FROM waitlist_order), 0.00) ) AS total_refund_amount

SELECT route.departure_city, route.arrival_city, CONCAT(route.departure_city, ' - ', route.arrival_city) AS route_label, COUNT(*) AS issued_order_count, COALESCE(SUM(route.passenger_count), 0) AS passenger_count, COALESCE(SUM(route.total_amount), 0.00) AS revenue FROM ( SELECT o.id, o.total_amount, COALESCE((SELECT s.departure_city FROM ticket_order_segment s WHERE s.order_id=o.id ORDER BY s.segment_no LIMIT 1), da.city) AS departure_city, COALESCE((SELECT s.arrival_city FROM ticket_order_segment s WHERE s.order_id=o.id ORDER BY s.segment_no DESC LIMIT 1), aa.city) AS arrival_city, COUNT(op.id) AS passenger_count FROM ticket_order o JOIN flight f ON o.flight_id = f.id JOIN airport da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id JOIN airport aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN order_passenger op ON o.id = op.order_id WHERE o.status = 'ISSUED' GROUP BY o.id, o.total_amount, departure_city, arrival_city ) route GROUP BY route.departure_city, route.arrival_city ORDER BY issued_order_count DESC, revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM ticket_order GROUP BY status ORDER BY FIELD(status, 'PENDING_PAYMENT', 'ISSUED', 'CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED', 'CHANGE_PENDING', 'CHANGED')
